name: maintainer-firewall
description: A maintainer-first GitHub Action that filters noisy issues and pull requests by evidence, reproducibility, scope, and project-specific rules.

scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run evaluate && npm run verify:dist
scripts.market:check: npm run ci && npm run coverage && npm run demo && npm audit --audit-level=moderate && npm pack --dry-run && node scripts/market-check.mjs
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run coverage && npm run demo && npm run evaluate && npm run verify:dist && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
scripts.verify:dist: npm run bundle && git diff --exit-code -- dist
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run test

author: wangjiehu
